1.gl: to give, used with greatest latitude of application (put, make, etc.)
1.kj: add, apply, appoint, ascribe, assign, [idiom] avenge, [idiom] be (healed), bestow, bring (forth, hither), cast, cause, charge, come, commit, consider, count, [phrase] cry, deliver

1.gl: to do or make, in the broadest sense and widest application
1.kj: accomplish, advance, appoint, apt, be at, become, bear, bestow, bring forth, bruise, be busy, [idiom] certainly, have the charge of, commit, deal (with), deck, [phrase] displease,

1.gl: a man as an individual or a male person; often used as an adjunct to a more definite term (and in such cases frequently not expressed in translation)
1.kj: also, another, any (man), a certain, [phrase] champion, consent, each, every (one), fellow, (foot-, husband-) man, (good-, great, mighty) man, he, high (degree), him (that is), hus
1.dv: contracted for H582 (אֱנוֹשׁ) (or perhaps rather from an unused root meaning to be extant);

1.gl: to inquire; by implication, to request; by extension, to demand

1.gl: time, especially (adverb with preposition) now, when, etc.
1.kj: [phrase] after, (al-) ways, [idiom] certain, [phrase] continually, [phrase] evening, long, (due) season, so (long) as, (even-, evening-, noon-) tide, (meal-), what) time, when.

1.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
1.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

2.gl: to depress literally or figuratively, transitive or intransitive (in various applications, as follows)

2.dv: a primitive root (possibly rather identical with H6030 (עָנָה) through the idea of looking down or browbeating);

2.gl: to tend a flock; i.e. pasture it; intransitively, to graze (literally or figuratively); generally to rule; by extension, to associate with (as a friend)
2.kj: [idiom] break, companion, keep company with, devour, eat up, evil entreat, feed, use as a friend, make friendship with, herdman, keep (sheep) (-er), pastor, [phrase] shearing house

2.gl: strictly nothingness; also trouble. vanity, wickedness; specifically an idol
2.kj: affliction, evil, false, idol, iniquity, mischief, mourners(-ing), naught, sorrow, unjust, unrighteous, vain, vanity, wicked(-ness). Compare H369 (אַיִן).
2.dv: from an unused root perhaps meaning properly, to pant (hence, to exert oneself, usually in vain; to come to naught);

2.gl: perhaps properly, to arrange; but used figuratively (of words), to speak; rarely (in a destructive sense) to subdue
2.kj: answer, appoint, bid, command, commune, declare, destroy, give, name, promise, pronounce, rehearse, say, speak, be spokesman, subdue, talk, teach, tell, think, use (entreaties), ut

2.gl: a non-entity; generally used as a negative particle
2.kj: else, except, fail, (father-) less, be gone, in(-curable), neither, never, no (where), none, nor, (any, thing), not, nothing, to nought, past, un(-searchable), well-nigh, without.
2.dv: as if from a primitive root meaning to be nothing or not exist;

2.gl: evil (as destructive), literally (ruin) or morally (especially guile); figuratively idolatry (as false, subjective), uselessness (as deceptive, objective; also adverbially, in vain)
2.dv: or שַׁו; from the same as H7722 (שׁוֹא) in the sense of desolating;

3.gl: to put (used in a great variety of applications, literal, figurative, inferentially, and elliptically)

3.gl: a mass of persons (or figuratively, things), especially reg. organized forwar (an army); by implication, a campaign, literally or figuratively (specifically, hardship, worship)
3.kj: appointed time, ([phrase]) army, ([phrase]) battle, company, host, service, soldiers, waiting upon, war(-fare).

3.gl: properly, the nose or nostril; hence, the face, and occasionally a person; also (from the rapid breathing in passion) ire
3.kj: anger(-gry), [phrase] before, countenance, face, [phrase] forebearing, forehead, [phrase] (long-) suffering, nose, nostril, snout, [idiom] worthy, wrath.

4.gl: to go (causatively, bring) out, in a great variety of applications, literally and figuratively, direct and proxim.

4.gl: to drive (an animal, a workman, a debtor, an army); by implication, to tax, harass, tyrannize
4.kj: distress, driver, exact(-or), oppress(-or), [idiom] raiser of taxes, taskmaster.

4.gl: a bow, forshooting (hence, figuratively, strength) or the iris

4.gl: a battle (i.e. the engagement); generally, war (i.e. warfare)

4.kj: alike, at all (once), both, likewise, only, (al-) together, withal.

4.gl: an angle; by implication, a pinnacle; figuratively, a chieftain

5.gl: adverb or preposition, with (i.e. in conjunction with), in varied applications; specifically, equally with; often with prepositional prefix (and then usually unrepresented in English)

11.gl: a sea (as breaking in noisy surf) or large body of water; specifically (with the article), the Mediterranean Sea; sometimes a large river, or an artifical basin; locally, the west, or (rarely) the south
11.dv: from an unused root meaning to roar;

12.dv: akin to H3212 (יָלַךְ); a primitive root;

12.gl: an appellation, as amark or memorial of individuality; by implication honor, authority, character

12.gl: to be strong; by implication, to prevail, act insolently
12.kj: exceed, confirm, be great, be mighty, prevail, put to more (strength), strengthen, be stronger, be valiant.

12.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
12.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).
